positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration featuring a group of celestial fauna, including a luminous fox with glowing tail tips, a crescent moon rabbit, and a small nebula-winged owl. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, set against a gradient background of deep sapphire and amethyst. The artwork style must be a blend of modern Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print techniques and clean, vector-based linework, utilizing strong outlines and flat areas of solid color with subtle, glowing accents. Focus on deep contrast, creating striking silhouettes of the animals against the starry background. Ideal for apparel printing, with visible print-friendly space around the main subject. Full body shot, magical, enchanting, symmetry, glowing bioluminescence, highly detailed linework, vector art.
